title: crataegus monogyna var. heterophylla
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. heterophylla, also known as hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular benefits due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna var. heterophylla include reducing blood pressure, improving heart function, and supporting cardiovascular health, making it a popular herb in natural remedies for heart conditions. Herbal preparations of Crataegus monogyna var. heterophylla include teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
